title: Vector contract indexing plan
changes: Add role-oriented Qdrant collection contracts for E5 384 vectors.
Add SQL-owned specialist instruction contracts and human representation contracts.
Add embedded contract descriptors and specialist output indexing descriptors.
Add bounded vector retrieval plan for contract/context/output/signal/synthesis recall.
Document E5/OpenVINO as embedding only behind adapter and Qdrant as projection only.
guards: Do not create one Qdrant database per specialist in 0126.
No Scheduler.run(), Dispatcher, Queue, PolicyEngine, EventBus, or RouteRuntimeManager changes.
No GitHub client, network client, watcher, service, VisPy renderer, Qdrant client, OpenVINO runtime, PostgreSQL driver, or LLM SDK import.
validation: PYTHONPATH=src:. python -m compileall -q src tests tools
